response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and web engineer with broad experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. There is no evidence of Japanese language proficiency (a hard requirement at native level), no embedded networking or LAN-switch experience, no Linux kernel investigation/modification work, and no security-technology background (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption). C experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, far from the strong C-for-UNIX proficiency required.
strengths: Long, diverse software engineering career with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Some low-level and systems exposure (C/C++ at National Instruments, low-latency DLang services, Linux)
Strong Linux and open-source track record, including maintaining infrastructure and libraries
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — a mandatory native-level requirement
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, L2/L3 networking, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection)
Minimal and dated C programming experience; no Linux kernel source modification background
